error.invalid_auth: Invalid authentication URL or failed to exchange token.

data_description.auth_code_url: Paste the entire URL starting with the ANWB login domain from your browser's address bar.

reauth_confirm.description:
Your ANWB Energie Account authentication has expired or is invalid. Please open the following link to log in again:

[Open Login]({auth_url})

After logging in, you will be redirected to a blank page or an error page. Copy the **entire URL** from your browser's address bar and paste it below.
reauth_confirm.title: Reauthenticate ANWB Energie Account

data_description.auth_code_url: Paste the entire URL starting with the ANWB login domain from your browser's address bar.

user.description:
Please open the following link to log in to your ANWB Energie Account:

[Open Login]({auth_url})

After logging in, you will be redirected to a blank page or an error page. Copy the **entire URL** from your browser's address bar and paste it below.
user.title: Link ANWB Energie Account
